name: Arabica Plantation AA (Green)
refersText: Washed Arabica green beans. Refers exclusively to premium washed Arabica crops.
description: Sourced via the local coffee boards in Chikkamagaluru. Exceptionally bold and uniform with a clean, mild cup profile.

name: Robusta Parchment AB (Green)
refersText: Washed Robusta green beans. India is world-renowned for high-quality washed Robustas.
description: Delivers a clean, non-rubbery, high-caffeine profile. Sourced through local coffee board auctions.

name: Arabica Cherry A (Green)
refersText: Natural / Dry-Processed Arabica green beans. Sun-dried whole cherries.
description: The whole cherry dries intact in the sun, creating yellowish-green beans with a sweet, fruit-forward profile.

name: Mysore Nuggets Extra Bold (MNEB)
refersText: Washed Arabica green beans. Formally exported under PL AAA standard.
description: The absolute apex of Indian Washed Arabica. Hand-polished, flawless green beans grown in Chikkamagaluru mountain zones.

name: Robusta Kaapi Royale (RKR)
refersText: Washed Robusta green beans. Premium specialty washed Robusta grading.
description: Sourced from Parchment A stock with zero tolerance for triage or unwashed quaker beans, delivering a soft, smooth cup.
